rewritten_requirements: The system shall list out job availability irrespective of field.
The system shall provide facets on criteria such as location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.
The system shall predict job availability based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: List out job availability irrespective of field
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Hence a platform for listing out the availability of jobs irrespective of the field is required.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide facets on criteria such as location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: it is important to provide facets on the abovementioned criteria so that they can narrow down to the jobs of their choice

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Predict job availability based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The objective is to develop a software solution to predict the availability of jobs based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.
